text:
Information
524 PRNTRL_DSCHRG_CD PRNTRL_DSCHRG_CD Nutritional Approaches (Discharge): Parenteral CHAR 1 This column documents whether the patient was receiving Parenteral/IV feeding as their nutritional approach at the time of discharge. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
525 FEED_TUBE_ADMSN_CD FEED_TUBE_ADMSN_CD Nutritional Approaches (Admission): Feeding tube CHAR 1 This column documents whether the patient was on a feeding tube as their nutritional approach at the time of
